ForwardedHeaders._comment: Reverse proxies whose X-Forwarded-For/Proto headers are trusted (e.g. the Azure App Service ingress). Leave empty to trust none (loopback only) — never trust arbitrary clients, or the per-IP rate limiter can be bypassed by spoofing the header. KnownNetworks entries are CIDR, e.g. '10.0.0.0/8'.

ApplicationInsights._comment: Azure Application Insights connection string (or env APPLICATIONINSIGHTS_CONNECTION_STRING) to ship logs, traces and metrics. Empty = telemetry stays local (console only).

Redis._comment: StackExchange.Redis connection string. Set it to make the SignalR backplane, output cache and rate limiter shared across instances (multi-instance-safe). Empty = in-memory single-instance.

Blob._comment: Azure Blob Storage connection string for uploads (multi-instance-safe). Empty = local disk under wwwroot/uploads served by static files.

GoogleAuth._comment: Google OAuth client id (the same one used by the frontend's Google Sign-In). Empty = social sign-in disabled; POST /api/auth/google returns a 'not configured' 400.

FacebookAuth._comment: Facebook Login app credentials. Empty = disabled; POST /api/auth/facebook returns a 'not configured' 400. AppId is public; set AppSecret via user-secrets/env, never here.
